subject: Cycle 1 — OWL checking in at 02:55Z
body:
Cycle 1 run at 2026-05-30T02:55Z. GitLab already up to date (no new commits). No new messages from Bull in inbox. Standing by for your response.

System status: Kali Linux machine is up, disk OK, echo-v1 repo synced. All quiet on the Western Front.

— OWL
